about.section_subtitle: Redefining how you consume business information
about.desc: BidMosaic Intelligence is an AI-powered multi-domain business intelligence platform. We've built a fully automated pipeline from data collection, AI analysis, to content delivery — integrating core capabilities from leading open-source intelligence projects so decision-makers can get the most valuable insights in the least amount of time.

product_common.cta_desc: Contact our team to learn how this product can drive your business growth

hive_dsp.title: HIVE.DSP
hive_dsp.tagline: Smart Bidding. Global Reach. Real Results.
hive_dsp.desc: HIVE.DSP is Bidmosaic's proprietary demand-side platform (DSP), built on advanced AI algorithms and big data analytics. It covers the open web to reach users everywhere, providing advertisers with full-funnel programmatic services from precision targeting and smart bidding to creative optimization.
hive_dsp.feature1_desc: Deep learning-powered real-time bidding engine that automatically optimizes bidding strategies for cost-efficient conversions
hive_dsp.feature2_desc: Integrated with major global SSPs/Exchanges and exclusive OEM resources, covering premium traffic across 200+ countries
hive_dsp.feature3_desc: Backed by 2.2B+ DMP data, enabling precise targeting based on user behavior profiles and interest tags
hive_dsp.feature4_desc: Millisecond-level real-time data tracking, multi-dimensional attribution analysis, full-funnel transparency

hivex_adn.title: HIVEX.ADN
hivex_adn.desc: HIVEX.ADN is a performance-oriented mobile ad network supporting CPA/CPS/CPI/CPL settlement models. It connects global quality publishers with advertisers, providing developers with efficient monetization solutions and advertisers with high-ROI performance campaigns.
hivex_adn.feature1_desc: Supporting CPA, CPS, CPI, CPL and other performance-based settlement methods, flexibly adapting to different advertiser needs
hivex_adn.feature2_desc: 100K+ partner apps covering major global app markets and vertical media, ensuring traffic quality and scale
hivex_adn.feature3_desc: AI-powered ad-publisher matching that boosts eCPM and conversion rates, creating win-win outcomes for advertisers and developers
hivex_adn.feature4_desc: Multi-dimensional fraud detection system that identifies abnormal traffic in real-time, ensuring authentic ad delivery

h5_engine.title: H5 Engine
h5_engine.tagline: Your Creative Engine. Your Traffic Moat.
h5_engine.desc: H5 Engine is Bidmosaic's proprietary interactive ad creative platform that uses AI to rapidly generate high-conversion H5 interactive ad materials. It builds your own traffic ecosystem, achieving the perfect combination of controllable traffic and quality content as continuous creative fuel for ad delivery.
h5_engine.feature1_desc: AI-based automated creative tools that rapidly produce diverse H5 interactive materials, dramatically boosting creative output capacity
h5_engine.feature2_desc: Rich library of interactive ad templates covering playable ads, mini-games, surveys, and more to boost user engagement
h5_engine.feature3_desc: Building your own traffic pool through quality H5 content, forming a traffic moat and reducing dependence on external traffic
h5_engine.feature4_desc: Creative-level performance tracking and A/B testing, continuously optimizing creative performance based on data to boost conversions
